title: bare_address does not strip RFC 5322 comments
description: RFC 5322 allows addresses in the form 'local@domain (Display Name)' where the parenthetical comment follows the addr-spec. bare_address() in message.rs only looks for angle brackets; when no '<' is present, it returns the whole string unchanged. For 'user@example.com (User Name)', address_part returns 'user@example.com (User Name)' for :all and 'example.com (User Name)' for :domain. A Sieve address :is test against 'user@example.com' then returns false (should be true), and address :domain :is against 'example.com' also fails. Trigger: From/To/CC header with comment after bare addr-spec and no angle brackets. Bad behavior: silent match failure.
